title: Add request timing middleware
description: Create middleware in `src/middleware/request-timing.ts` that measures request duration and adds `X-Response-Time` header. Include integration test following existing middleware patterns in `src/middleware/`.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts - factory pattern `createRequestLogger` returning middleware function, NextRequest/NextResponse handling, excludePaths config option
src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts - `createRateLimiterMiddleware` factory pattern, similar NextRequest handling
src/middleware/request-logger.test.ts - vitest with fake timers, `makeRequest` helper, tests for middleware function and completeAndLog
src/middleware/rate-limiter.test.ts - co-located test file with SlidingWindowRateLimiter class tests
